title: Interactive TUI with bubbletea
description:
Implement the full interactive TUI launched via 'ccs ui'.

Refer to docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-13-ccs-design.md for the TUI layout, key bindings, and component design.

This task depends on all prior tasks (foundation, indexer, opener, CLI).

Key context:
- Use bubbletea for the app model, lipgloss for styling, bubbles for components (table, textinput, viewport)
- Layout: top bar with search + filter, main session list table, bottom detail pane, footer with key hints
- The detail pane shows metadata for the highlighted session
- Real-time search filtering as the user types
- Tag dialog: inline prompt to add/remove tags
- Delete confirmation: inline yes/no prompt
- On Enter (open), the TUI should exit cleanly, then exec into the claude session
- Project filter cycles through All + each discovered project via Tab
requirements: Create internal/tui/styles.go with lipgloss styles: colors for headers, selected rows, tags, staleness indicators (sessions >30 days old), borders, help text

Create internal/tui/app.go with the main bubbletea Model struct, Init, Update, View functions. Model holds: session list, selected index, search query, active project filter, detail pane data, current mode (normal/search/tag/delete-confirm/help)
Create internal/tui/list.go with the session list component: renders a table with columns Name/ID, Project, Branch, Updated (relative time). Highlights selected row. Supports j/k and arrow navigation
Create internal/tui/detail.go with the detail pane component: shows Tags, CWD, First message, Last message for the highlighted session
Create internal/tui/search.go with the search input component: uses bubbles textinput, filters the session list in real-time as the user types. Activated with '/', deactivated with Esc
Create internal/tui/tag.go with the tag dialog: inline prompt asking for tag name to add/remove. Toggle existing tags on the selected session
Create internal/tui/help.go with a help overlay showing all key bindings, toggled with '?'
Wire the TUI into internal/cli/ui.go as the 'ccs ui' subcommand — load sessions via indexer, launch the bubbletea program, handle the open-session-on-exit flow
On Enter: store the selected session, exit the TUI via tea.Quit, then the CLI command calls opener.OpenSession
Tab cycles project filter: All -> project1 -> project2 -> ... -> All
Staleness: sessions updated >30 days ago get a dimmed/muted style
Verify the project compiles with 'go build ./cmd/ccs/' and all tests pass with 'go test ./...'
